allow: PowerShell(docker exec tickets_postgres psql -U postgres -d nexo_db -c "\\d auth.credentials" 2>&1)

PowerShell($maxWait = 60; $waited = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $waited += 5; $result = docker info 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "Docker ready after ${waited}s"; break } else { Write-Output "Waiting... ${waited}s" } } while \($waited -lt $maxWait\); if \($waited -ge $maxWait\) { Write-Output "Timeout - Docker not ready" })
